name: billing
description: Stripe subscription tracking and plan enforcement via webhooks.
author: SoftBacon Software

configSchema.label: Stripe Webhook Secret
configSchema.description: whsec_... from Stripe dashboard. Required for webhook signature verification.

configSchema.label: Grace Period (days)
configSchema.description: Days to allow API access after payment fails before enforcing 403.

configSchema.label: Auto-Provision on Payment
configSchema.description: Automatically provision a new instance when a customer pays.

configSchema.label: Railway API Token
configSchema.description: Railway API token for auto-provisioning customer instances.

configSchema.label: Cloudflare API Token
configSchema.description: Cloudflare API token for DNS record creation.

configSchema.label: Cloudflare Zone ID
configSchema.description: Cloudflare zone ID for the base domain.

configSchema.label: Base Domain
configSchema.description: Base domain for customer subdomains (e.g. mycelium.fyi).

configSchema.label: GitHub Repo URL
configSchema.description: GitHub repo to deploy customer instances from.
